headline: Capital One Q2 2026 earnings beat estimates as credit losses fell
summary: The bank posted adjusted EPS of $5.81 in the second quarter, topping analyst estimates, as its provision for credit losses dropped $1.1 billion

headline: Capital One (NYSE:COF) Posts Q2 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates
summary: Financial services company Capital One (NYSE:COF) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 26% year on year to $15.85 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $5.81 per share was 23.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) Earnings Beat Highlights Quality Growth Amid Credit Improvement
summary: Capital One reported Q2 2026 adjusted EPS of $5.81, beating estimates, while revenue slightly missed. Credit quality improved sharply, though the stock fell 7.6% on profit-taking after a strong run.

headline: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Could Be 123% Overvalued Following Its Record High
summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock hit a record high of $368.80 after an upgrade from Capital One and growing attention on AI security, drawing fresh interest to how the cybersecurity company is currently valued. See our latest analysis for Palo Alto Networks. The pullback to a US$348.66 share price after the recent record high comes after a strong run, with a 30 day share price return of 21.15% and a 90 day share price return of 99.28%, while the 5 year total shareholder return of 424.31%...
